chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-93 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2026. None present for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh alongwith ASI Muhammad Naeem from PS SITE, Hyderabad. Respondent No.6 (Zakir Ali) alongwith his wife (Mst. Laila @ Naila) ***************************************** Respondent No.6 (Zakir Ali) is present in Court alongwith his wife namely Mst. Laila @ Naila. On the last date of hearing, ASI Muhammad Naeem of PS SITE, Hyderabad was entrusted to conduct fair inquiry and submit such report. Today, he is present and submits that the Respondent No.6 has contracted marriage with the sister of Petitioner therefore, this Petition has been filed just to pressurize the Respondent No.6. He further submits that previously Mst. Laila @ Naila was married and such previous Nikahnama reflects her parentage as Darya Khan. On the other hand, Mst. Laila @ Naila present in Court submits that the real facts are that the Petitioner is her step sister and in order to usurp the inherited land / property, the Petitioner has filed the instant Petition and her parentage has been changed by creating influence in NADRA for which she contends that she will sue in accordance with law. In view of above circumstances, it appears that the instant Petition has been filed with malafide intention and concealment of real facts in order to create harassment against the Respondent couple, therefore, this Petition Page 2 of 2 stands dismissed with cost of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees Ten Thousand Only) to be deposited in the library of this Court.

Laila @ Naila present in Court submits that the real facts are that the Petitioner is her step sister and in order to usurp the inherited land / property, the Petitioner has filed the instant Petition and her parentage has been changed by creating influence in NADRA for which she contends that she will sue in accordance with law. In view of above circumstances, it appears that the instant Petition has been filed with malafide intention and concealment of real facts in order to create harassment against the Respondent couple, therefore, this Petition Page 2 of 2 stands dismissed with cost of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees Ten Thousand Only) to be deposited in the library of this Court. Till depositing of cost amount, the CNIC having No.41304-1207504-2 of the Petitioner shall remain blocked. Let a copy of this order be communicated with Regional Director NADRA, Hyderabad for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
